Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Provisional Class Certification
Off Calendar Nov-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JEFFREY DE LAPP'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT AND PROVISIONAL CLASS CERTIFICATION. Appearances: James R. Patterson of Harrison Patterson & O'Connor LLP (619.756.6993) for plaintiff and moving party; Judith Droz Keyes of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP (276.6512) for defendant and responding party. Discussed. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. The parties agreed on the date for the final approval hearing as March 7, 2010 (counsel to file the notice of motion). Order signed in open court. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR #5797
